title: selaginella parvifolia
intro: Selaginella parvifolia, also known as the small-leaved spike moss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Selaginella parvifolia can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although proper preparation and dosing should be guided by a healthcare professional.
